prompt: Subject: Gaze across the water surface. Depict a woman in her 20s who has entered an outdoor night pool up to her waist, looking back while facing away, positioned slightly to the left of the center. The figure occupies about 70% of the screen, captured vertically from the crown to the upper thighs. Blue water and warm lighting surround the figure, creating the air of a quiet resort night. Person/Expression: Bright ivory-beige porcelain skin. Natural highlights on the cheeks, nose, shoulders, and back, leaving a fine skin texture and tiny water droplets. Pale rose-pink blush, champagne-beige and pink-brown eye makeup, long thin eyelashes, natural eye bags, soft brown eyebrows, and sheer pink-beige lip gloss. Catchlights in the clear eyes, lips slightly parted, looking at the camera with a calm expression. Hair is bright milky tea ash brown. Thin see-through bangs, medium-long reaching the shoulders with a natural clumped texture. Clothing/Pose: A greige rib-material bikini with thin straps and a back knot. The body is twisted to look back at the camera. Right hand is lightly under the chin. Background/Light: Outdoor pool at a night resort. Blue underwater lighting illuminates from below, and warm lights from the rear left edge the silhouette. Composition/Camera: Vertical 3:4, 85mm medium telephoto lens, shallow depth of field. Texture/Style: Realistic portrait with high-definition skin texture, wet hair, and transparent water surface. Negative: Underage-looking persons, unnatural faces, extra fingers, or broken joints.
